div.label: API Key *

input.style: width:100%; padding:6px 8px; font-size:13px; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:3px; box-sizing:border-box;

div.div: Will be stored securely in Splunk credential vault, not in any conf file.

div.label: API Base URL *

input.style: width:100%; padding:6px 8px; font-size:13px; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:3px; box-sizing:border-box;

div.div: Base URL for the VisionHeight API. Drives both the modular input (ingestion) and the vhipmetadata search command. Must start with https://. Leave blank to use the shipped default.

div.label: Refresh Interval (seconds) *

input.style: width:180px; padding:6px 8px; font-size:13px; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:3px;

div.div: How often (in seconds) the modular input wakes up to check for Run Now and scheduled-time triggers. Default 60.

div.label: Enable Ingestion
div.div: When unchecked, the modular input will not run on schedule.

div.label: Managed Indexes
div.div: Indexes the Security Analytics dashboards search across. Defaults to main if none are configured.

input.style: height:30px; padding:0 8px; font-size:13px; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:3px; width:200px; box-sizing:border-box;

div.label: Managed IP Fields
div.div: Fields the dashboards coalesce() together to derive each event's IP. First non-null wins. Leave empty to use a safe default list (src_ip, src, client_ip, sourceIPAddress, dest_ip, dest).

input.style: height:30px; padding:0 8px; font-size:13px; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:3px; width:280px; box-sizing:border-box;

div.label: Route outbound traffic through an HTTP proxy
div.div: Enable when this Splunk instance has no direct internet access and must reach the VisionHeight API through a corporate proxy. Applies to both the modular input (ingestion) and the vhipmetadata search command.

input.style: width:100%; padding:6px 8px; font-size:13px; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:3px; box-sizing:border-box;
width:100%; padding:6px 8px; font-size:13px; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:3px; box-sizing:border-box;
width:100%; padding:6px 8px; font-size:13px; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:3px; box-sizing:border-box;

input.placeholder: Required only when Username is set
input.style: width:100%; padding:6px 8px; font-size:13px; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:3px; box-sizing:border-box;

div.div: Password is stored in Splunk's encrypted credential vault, never in plain text. Only plaintext HTTP CONNECT-style proxies are supported (HTTPS to the origin server is still tunneled). HTTPS-scheme proxies (TLS to the proxy itself) and SOCKS proxies are not supported. The configured proxy overrides any NO_PROXY environment variable inherited by splunkd — disable the checkbox above to fall back to direct connections.

div.label: Custom CA Bundle Path (optional)

input.style: width:100%; padding:6px 8px; font-size:13px; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:3px; box-sizing:border-box;

div.div: Absolute path to an additional PEM bundle of CA certificates used to validate outbound TLS (VisionHeight API and S3 download). Leave blank to use the system default trust store — correct for Splunk Cloud and any host with direct public-internet access. Set this on on-prem hosts that sit behind a TLS-inspection proxy or trust a private internal CA: the bundle is added to the default trust store, never substituted for it. Certificate verification is never disabled.

button.style: background:#5a4fcf; color:#fff; border:none; padding:8px 22px; border-radius:3px; font-size:14px; cursor:pointer;
